title: corydalis yanhusuo
intro: Corydalis yanhusuo, also known as Yangzhengxiacao, is a perennial flowering plant native to China, belonging to the family Papaveraceae. Traditionally used in Chinese medicine, Corydalis yanhusuo is known for its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and anti-anxiety properties, which are attributed to its alkaloid content, particularly dehydrocorybulbine (DHCB). The health benefits of Corydalis yanhusuo include relief from pain, improved mood, and reduced anxiety, making it a popular herb for treating conditions such as fibromyalgia, insomnia, and depression. Corydalis yanhusuo is available in various herbal preparations, including capsules, tablets, and teas, which can be purchased in health food stores or online.
